experience.label: Has hood (whether the garment has a hood, derived from neckline)

experience.label: Has detachable hood (hood that can be removed)

experience.label: Has text or slogan graphic (whether a prominent text or wording is part of the decoration)

experience.label: Sportswear (whether the garment is marketed as sportswear or activewear)

credence.name: price
credence.label: Price

credence.name: material
credence.label: Fabric composition (fibre content detected in description or tags, e.g. cotton, polyester, wool, linen, silk, lyocell)

credence.name: has_yoke_panel
credence.label: Has yoke panel (structured panel across the upper back or shoulders)

credence.name: toxin_free
credence.label: Toxin-free certification (e.g. OEKO-TEX, bluesign)

credence.name: vegan
credence.label: Vegan (no animal-derived materials; false if wool, silk, leather, down etc. are present)

credence.name: is_sustainable
credence.label: Sustainable (whether the garment uses sustainable materials or certifications, e.g. organic cotton, recycled polyester, Tencel, GOTS)

credence.name: is_woven_fabric
credence.label: Woven fabric (true if the main fabric is woven, false if knit/jersey/fleece, null if indeterminate)

search.name: family
search.label: Whether family dynamics are a central theme

search.name: on_DVD
search.label: Whether the film has been released on a physical home media format (DVD, VHS, Blu-ray, Betamax, LaserDisc, etc.)

search.name: music
search.label: Whether music is a significant thematic or narrative element (distinct from the musical genre)

search.name: supernatural
search.label: Whether the film has supernatural elements such as ghosts, monsters, vampires, or demons

search.name: fantasy
search.label: Whether the film is a fantasy, including magical realism and supernatural fantasy

search.name: popularity

search.label: Number of ratings for the movie

experience.label: Whether the film is a sequel or part of a franchise
